scenario.context: Station 5 of the day: needs and requirements analysis.
scenario.mission: You capture customer requirements and derive a suitable workstation recommendation.

constraints: capture questions in a structured way
record a brief profile in writing

customerRequest.subject: Needs analysis for new workstations
customerRequest.body:
Please conduct a structured needs analysis for a small sales group.

We need a short requirements profile as the basis for the selection decision.

questions.title: Good questions in the initial interview
questions.prompt: Which questions are professionally relevant for the needs analysis? (Multiple selection)

options.text: How many monitors and which ports are required?
Which answer color should the device have?
options.rationale: Not a professional core point for the use case.

options.text: Are there constraints on budget or standardization?
options.rationale: Economic and operational requirements are central.

options.text: Should the user's private apps be installed automatically?
options.rationale: Not standardized and often not allowed.

feedback.correct: Correct: you capture technical and economic core requirements.
feedback.wrong: Partially unsuitable: please prioritize professional criteria more strongly.

questions.title: Requirement or wish
questions.prompt: Which statement is a real technical requirement?

options.text: The PC should look as cool as possible
options.rationale: Vague wish, not a robust criterion.

options.text: The workstation needs 2 monitors with native full HD output
The device should simply be the best

feedback.correct: Correct: the statement is concrete and verifiable.
feedback.wrong: Not specific enough for a technical selection.

feedback.correct: Correct: this produces a robust recommendation.
feedback.wrong: Not optimal: secure validated requirements first, then compare.

questions.title: Dual-monitor requirement
questions.prompt: A group has 18 employees, 70% of them need two monitors. For how many workstations should you plan dual-monitor equipment (round up)?

feedback.wrong: Please calculate the percentage and round up to full workstations.

questions.title: Mini requirements profile
questions.prompt: Formulate a short requirements profile (4-6 sentences) with usage, must-have criteria and budget frame.
questions.expectedOutline: Compact: usage profile, technical must-haves, economic frame.

feedback.correct: Correct: the profile is directly usable as a working basis.
feedback.wrong: Please state usage, must-have criteria and budget frame more clearly.
